title: Elder.js
excerpt: description: Deploy an Elder.js static site to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Elder.js ↗](https://elderguide.com/tech/elderjs/) is an SEO-focused framework for building static sites with [SvelteKit](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/framework-guides/deploy-a-svelte-kit-site/). In this guide, you will create a new Elder.js application and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages.
